heading: Examinations for merchant mariner credentials
label: 7116 Examinations for merchant mariner credentials
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c). Text read as follows: “In this section, the term ‘merchant mariner credential’ has the meaning that term has in section 7510.”Pub. L. 119–60
amendments: Amendments2025—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c). Text read as follows: “In this section, the term ‘merchant mariner credential’ has the meaning that term has in section 7510.”Pub. L. 119–60

children.heading: .—Requirement for Sample Exams
children.label: a .—Requirement for Sample Exams
children.text: The Secretary shall develop a sample merchant mariner credential examination and outline of merchant mariner examination topics on an annual basis.

children.heading: .—Public Availability
children.label: b .—Public Availability
children.text: Each sample examination and outline of topics developed under subsection (a) shall be readily available to the public.
